historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Miss Bardolf was born about 1161, in Hoo, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Bardolf, was 37 and her mother, Amabilia De Lindsay, was 33. She had at least 1 daughter. She died before 1225, in Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Miss Bardolf est née environ 1161, à Hoo, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Bardolf, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Amabilia De Lindsay, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 1225, à Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Miss Bardolf um 1161 in Hoo, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Bardolf 37 und ihre Mutter Amabilia De Lindsay 33. Sie hatte mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 1225 in Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Miss Bardolf è nata il circa 1161 nel Hoo, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Bardolf, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Amabilia De Lindsay, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia. Morì prima del 1225, nel Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Miss Bardolfが約1161年にイギリスイギリスケントホーオで生まれた時，父William Bardolfは37歳，母Amabilia De Lindsayは33歳であった。彼女は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1225年以前にイギリスエセックスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Miss Bardolf(이)가 대략 1161년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 후에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Bardolf(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Amabilia De Lindsay(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1225년 이전 영국 에세스에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Miss Bardolf родилась около 1161 г. в местности ху, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Bardolf было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Amabilia De Lindsay, 33. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 1225 г. в местности эссекс, Англия.
